description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a driveway, garage, and a backyard swimming pool. The house features a light-colored exterior with numerous large windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a prominent double garage with a gable roof, a paved driveway, and a main entryway with steps and a small overhang. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a rectangular pool, green lawn, and several mature trees and shrubs. The roof is primarily gable-style with a central peak and lower extensions. The property is bordered by hedges and fencing, with paved walkways and driveways connecting the house to the street.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with a gable roof, double garage, large windows, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped lot with trees and fencing.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the house, highlighting the backyard lawn, trees, and the pool area adjacent to the house.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, featuring the double garage, main driveway, and entryway, with landscaping and street access.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the backyard with the pool, patio area, and the rear facade of the house, emphasizing the large windows and fenced yard.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side and rear of the house, with the pool, lawn, and fencing visible, as well as the side driveway and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a small overhang, and a double garage door, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
